overview.whatIsContent: Provable fairness is a concept in online gaming that ensures that the outcome of a game is determined by a random process, and that the process cannot be manipulated by the operator or any other party. In other words, it is a way to ensure that the odds of winning are the same for all players, and that the outcome of the game is completely random and unpredictable.
overview.howToMakeTitle: How can we make bets Provably Fair?
overview.howToMakeContent: To make bets Provably Fair, CYBET uses a combination of the following components:

components.serverSeed: server-side seed - a randomly generated value that is created by the operator and used as an input for the random number generator.
components.clientSeed: client-side seed - a value that is generated by the player's browser and also used as an input for the random number generator.
components.nonce: cryptographic nonce - a value that is used to ensure that the outcome of the game cannot be predicted or manipulated.

overview.howToMakeFooter: When the game is played, the three components are combined and used as inputs for the random number generator. The output of the generator is then used to determine the outcome of the game. By using a combination of these three values, it becomes virtually impossible for any party to predict or manipulate the outcome of the game.
overview.howToVerifyTitle: How can bets be verified as fair?
overview.howToVerifyContent: To verify that a bet is fair, players can check the server-side seed, client-side seed, and cryptographic nonce via the verify page here.
overview.independentTestingTitle: Independent Testing of Cybet Original Games Limbo Crash Dlce
overview.independentTestingContent: Limbo Crash Dlce games and their random number generator have been independently tested and certified as Provably Fair by a 3rd party.

li.title: Responsible Gambling at Cybet
li.content: At Cybet, we believe gambling should always be an enjoyable and responsible form of entertainment. It should never be seen as a way to make money, solve financial problems, or escape life's challenges.
li.content2: We're committed to providing a safe and transparent gaming environment where our players can enjoy themselves responsibly and with full control.

li.title: What Is Responsible Gambling?
li.content: Responsible gambling means understanding the risks of gambling and setting healthy boundaries around time and money spent on gaming. It's about keeping gambling as a leisure activity, not a financial strategy or coping mechanism.
li.content2: At Cybet, we promote responsible gambling by offering practical tools such as self-exclusion, wager limits, and loss limits. These features empower players to take control of their gaming activity and play within safe limits.

about.questions: Have questions or concerns regarding your account?
about.answer: Our experts are here to help!
about.emotionalHarm: While most players gamble for fun, some may develop unhealthy gambling habits that can lead to financial or emotional harm.
about.preventingAddiction: Recognizing the warning signs early is key to preventing addiction.
about.theFollowing: You may be at risk if you notice one or more of the following:
about.originallyIntended: Spending more time or money gambling than you originally intended
about.whenYouWant: Finding it difficult or impossible to stop gambling, even when you want to.
about.theNextSession: Constantly thinking about gambling or planning the next session.
about.moneyYouveLost: Chasing losses — trying to win back money you’ve lost.
about.excitementAsBefore: Increasing bet sizes to feel the same excitement as before.
about.financialHarm: Gambling despite knowing it’s causing personal or financial harm.
about.becauseofGambling: Neglecting work, studies, or family obligations because of gambling.
about.gamblingHabits: Lying to family, friends, or colleagues about your gambling habits.
about.gamblingActivity: Becoming defensive or secretive when asked about gambling activity.
about.toFundGambling: Borrowing money, taking loans, or using credit cards to fund gambling.
about.continueGambling: Selling personal belongings to continue gambling.
about.necessitiesGamble: Using money meant for bills, rent, or necessities to gamble.
about.experiencingMounting: Falling behind on financial obligations or experiencing mounting debt.
about.whenNotGambling: Feeling anxious, irritable, or restless when not gambling.
about.lonelinessDepression: Using gambling to escape stress, loneliness, or depression.
about.afterGambling: Experiencing guilt, shame, or regret after gambling.
about.enjoyableActivities: Losing interest in hobbies, relationships, or other enjoyable activities.
about.gamblingOutcomes: Feeling hopeless or having mood swings related to gambling outcomes.
about.considerSelfExclusion: If any of these signs resonate with you, it may be time to set limits, take a break, or consider self-exclusion.
about.under18YearsofAge: Cybet strictly prohibits gambling by individuals under 18 years of age.
about.legalAgeRequirement: We take the prevention of underage gambling extremely seriously. Our platform uses verification procedures to confirm that all users meet the minimum legal age requirement.
about.willBeImmediately: If an account is found to belong to a person under 18 years old, the account will be immediately suspended, all winnings forfeited, and access permanently denied.
about.sharedorFamilyDevices: Parents and guardians are strongly encouraged to monitor and manage their children’s online activity, especially on shared or family devices.
about.websitesAndApps: To help prevent underage access, we recommend using parental control software to block gambling websites and apps.
about.protectYourWellbeing: Self-exclusion allows you to take a break from gambling if you feel it’s becoming difficult to control. It’s a proactive step designed to protect your wellbeing.
about.CybetAccount: Log in to your Cybet account.
about.ChooseYourExclusion: Choose your exclusion type (specific products or all gambling activities).
about.SelectDuration: Select a duration: 24 hours, 1 week, 1 month, 6 months, or permanently.
about.OnceActivated: Once activated, your self-exclusion will take effect immediately. During this time, you will not be able to deposit funds, place bets, or access restricted sections of the site.
about.CustomerSupport: If you need help setting this up, our Customer Support Team is available 24/7 to guide you.
about.breakFromGambling: Our self-exclusion policy is designed to ensure player safety and enforce a meaningful break from gambling.
about.makeDeposits: You cannot place bets or make deposits.
about.promotionalCommunications: You will be removed from all marketing and promotional communications.
about.yourExclusionType: Your account may be temporarily or permanently locked, depending on your exclusion type.
about.ifApplicable: You can still withdraw remaining balances, if applicable.
about.reversedOnceActive: Self-exclusions cannot be shortened or reversed once active.
about.maintainControl: Cybet offers customisable gambling limits to help you manage your spending and maintain control.
about.dailyWeeklyMonthly: A wager limit allows you to set the maximum amount you can stake within a specific time frame (daily, weekly, or monthly).
about.thePeriodResets: Once your wager limit is reached, you will be unable to place further bets until the period resets.
about.untilTheNextDay: If you set a $10,000 daily wager limit and reach that amount, your betting activity will be paused until the next day.
about.lossLimitAllows: A loss limit allows you to define the maximum amount you can afford to lose (net losses) over a chosen period (daily, weekly, or monthly).
about.nextCycleBegins: Once this limit is reached, further betting is automatically restricted until the next cycle begins.
about.restTheWeek: If you set a $2000 weekly loss limit and reach that amount, you will be unable to continue gambling for the rest of the week.
about.accountSettings: You can increase, decrease, or remove limits anytime from your account settings.
about.thoughtfulDecisions: However, increases or removals will only take effect after a short cooling-off period (e.g., 24 hours) to ensure thoughtful decisions.
about.seekHelpEarly: If you or someone you know is struggling with gambling, it's important to seek help early.
about.professionalSupport: These trusted organisations provide free, confidential, and professional support:
about.CybetAffiliation: Cybet is not affiliated with these organisations, but we fully support their mission to help individuals maintain healthy gambling habits.

exclusion.title: Taking a break from gambling
exclusion.content: Cybet is committed to providing you with a safe, enjoyable, and responsible gaming environment.
exclusion.content1: To enhance your gaming experience you can choose to take a break or give yourself some time away from gambling.Your break will start immediately once confirmed and it is non-reversible.
exclusion.content2: Our safe gambling process is detailed below:
exclusion.content3: You have another 24 hours to extend your Platform self-exclusion before it resets the cooldown period and you have toinitiate the process again.
exclusion.content4: Gain control over your play or betting by using loss or wagering limits. These limits allow you to control the maximum loss or wagered amount over a daily, weekly or monthly period.
exclusion.content5: Your limit will apply immediately and will reset when that time is reached. E.g. If you set a $100 daily loss limit at 2pm today, the limit will reset at 2pm tomorrow.
exclusion.content6: Any changes to remove your limits require a 12-hour cool off period.
exclusion.content7: You could self-exclude from sports, casino or from the platform (If you self-exclude from the platform, you will not be able to log in). Self-exclusion is a STRICTLY IRREVERSIBLE process, NO ONE will be able to remove this for you.
exclusion.Step1_content: Take a 24 hour cooldown from betting from sports, casino, or both. You will still be able to access the platform and you can earn and claim rewards. During the 24 hours, you can change the type of cooldown but this will reset the 24 hour timer.
exclusion.Step2_content: After your 24 hours cooldown ends, you have 24 hours to extend your self-exclusion period by 1 day, 1 week, 1 month, 6 months or permanently. You could self-exclude from sports, casino or from the platform (If you self-exclude from the platform, you will not be able to log in). Self-exclusion is a STRICTLY IRREVERSIBLE process, NO ONE will be able to remove this for you.
exclusion.check1: I will STRICTLY NOT be able to cancel the Cooldown
exclusion.check2: I will still be able to access my account and make withdrawls
exclusion.check3: I will NOT be able to place bets in
exclusion.check5: I will STRICTLY NOT be able to cancel the Self-exclusion
exclusion.check6: I will NOT be able to access my account and will be logged out immediately
exclusion.tip2: You can remove your gambling limit at any time. Please allow up to12 hours for any updates to your limits to take effect on your account.
exclusion.number_greater: The input number must be greater than 0
exclusion.integer_cannot: The integer part cannot exceed 9 digits
